original: You can’t use this module on something without shields!
For some reason, "+t.getCombatName()+" tries to leach shields that no longer exist. What a waste!
A crackling vortex appears between "+e.getCombatName()+" and your own vessel as your shield vampire siphons energy!
Your view ripples and shudders as "+t.getCombatName()+" leaches your shield away!
h.m.possessive(e.capitalA+e.short)+" shield flickers as "+h.m.possessive(t.getCombatName())+" shield vampire leaches its defensive screen away!
Despite your best efforts, the shield vampire can’t seem to leach "+h.m.possessive(e.getCombatName())+" shields.
Despite "+h.m.possessive(t.getCombatName())+" best efforts, your shields are too robust to be siphoned by a shield vampire.
Despite "+h.m.possessive(t.getCombatName())+" best efforts, "+h.m.possessive(e.getCombatName())+" shields are too robust to be siphoned by a shield vampire.
